attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 NATGLD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY, 
 NATGLD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE, 
 NATGLD.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG, 
 NATGLD.AR_TRX_KEY, 
 NATL1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,  /* Take TRX LINE KEY OF SUBSKU */
 NATGLD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY, 
 NATGLD.GL_DATETIME, 
 NATGLD.TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE, 
 NATGLD.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_DEBIT_AMT, 
 NATGLD.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT, 
 NATGLD.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT, 
 NATGLD.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_CREDIT_AMT, 
 NATGLD.BK_JE_LN_COMPANY_CODE, 
 NATGLD.BK_JE_LN_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT, 
 NATGLD.BK_JE_LN_JE_LINE_NUMBER_INT, 
 NATGLD.BK_JE_LN_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
 NATGLD.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE, 
 NATGLD.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT, 
 NATGLD.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT, 
 NATGLD.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE, 
 NATGLD.COGS_PCT, 
 NATGLD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT, 
 NATGLD.SS_CODE, 
 NATGLD.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, 
 NATGLD.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
 NATGLD.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME, 
 NATGLD.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
 NATGLD.AR_POSTING_CONTROL_KEY, 
 NATGLD.GL_POSTED_DT ,
 NATGLD. AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
 NATL1.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT   AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
 NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT   AS PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT ,
 NATL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG,
 NULL AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 NULL AS OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_KEY,
 NULL AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD , 
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATGLD 
 /* INNER JOIN  $$STGDB.ST_OM_RA_CUST_TRX_LN_GLDT SCTGLDT 
  ON SCTGLDT.CUST_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ID =  NATGLD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT  */
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATL ON
   NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATGLD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  /* TOPSKU  line joined */
 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATL1 ON
   NATL1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATGLD.SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY        /* get SUB SKU Lines */
 WHERE NATL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG  = 'Y' 
 AND NATL.WITH_PARENT_ROLE = 'Y'
 AND  NATGLD.GL_DATETIME  BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
 AND NATGLD.SUB_PRD_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY NOT IN (-9999,-8888)

SELECT 
	NATGLD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY, 
	NATGLD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE, 
	NATGLD.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG, 
	NATGLD.AR_TRX_KEY, 
	NATGLD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,  /* Take TRX LINE KEY OF SUBSKU */
	NATGLD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY, 
	NATGLD.GL_DATETIME, 
	NATGLD.TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE, 
	NATGLD.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_DEBIT_AMT, 
	NATGLD.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT, 
	NATGLD.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT, 
	NATGLD.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_CREDIT_AMT, 
	NATGLD.BK_JE_LN_COMPANY_CODE, 
	NATGLD.BK_JE_LN_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT, 
	NATGLD.BK_JE_LN_JE_LINE_NUMBER_INT, 
	NATGLD.BK_JE_LN_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
	NATGLD.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE, 
	NATGLD.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT, 
	NATGLD.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT, 
	NATGLD.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE, 
	NATGLD.COGS_PCT, 
	NATGLD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT, 
	NATGLD.SS_CODE, 
	NATGLD.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, 
	NATGLD.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
	NATGLD.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME, 
	NATGLD.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
	NATGLD.AR_POSTING_CONTROL_KEY, 
	NATGLD.GL_POSTED_DT ,
	NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, /*Parent same as Orig for Standard */ 
	NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
	NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT AS PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT, /*Parent same as Orig for Standard */ 
	NATL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG ,
	NULL AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	NULL AS OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_KEY,
	NULL AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD , 
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATGLD 
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATL ON
		NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATGLD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY  /* Standard ITEM lines joined */
WHERE NATL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG  = 'N' 
AND  NATGLD.GL_DATETIME  BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
AND NOT EXISTS /* donot pull already populated records */
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ITEMLN WATGLD
WHERE NATGLD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = WATGLD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY)

SELECT 
NATGLD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY, 
NATGLD.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE, 
NATGLD.ACCOUNT_SET_FLAG, 
NATGLD.AR_TRX_KEY, 
NATGLD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,  
NATGLD.GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY, 
NATGLD.GL_DATETIME, 
NATGLD.TRANSACTION_LINE_PERCENTAGE, 
NATGLD.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_DEBIT_AMT, 
NATGLD.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_DEBIT_AMT, 
NATGLD.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_TRXL_CREDIT_AMT, 
NATGLD.RU_AR_TRX_LINE_FUNC_CREDIT_AMT, 
NATGLD.BK_JE_LN_COMPANY_CODE, 
NATGLD.BK_JE_LN_JOURNAL_ENTRY_NUM_INT, 
NATGLD.BK_JE_LN_JE_LINE_NUMBER_INT, 
NATGLD.BK_JE_LN_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY, 
NATGLD.BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE, 
NATGLD.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT, 
NATGLD.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT, 
NATGLD.CREDIT_DEBIT_TYPE, 
NATGLD.COGS_PCT, 
NATGLD.SK_CST_TRX_LIN_GL_DIST_ID_LINT, 
NATGLD.SS_CODE, 
NATGLD.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME, 
NATGLD.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
NATGLD.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME, 
NATGLD.EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
NATGLD.AR_POSTING_CONTROL_KEY, 
NATGLD.GL_POSTED_DT ,
NATGLD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY AS PARENT_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT   AS CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT,
NATL.SK_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT   AS PAR_CUSTOMER_TRX_LINE_ID_LINT ,
COALESCE( NATIL.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG,'N') AS OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG ,
NULL AS DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NULL AS OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_KEY,
NULL AS DV_PRODUCT_KEY
FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_AR_MONTH_PROCESS_DATE EAMPD , 
	$$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST NATGLD 
  INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_LINE NATL
	ON NATGLD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
  LEFT JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL
	ON NATGLD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATIL.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
WHERE 1=1
AND  NATGLD.GL_DATETIME  BETWEEN EAMPD.START_DATE AND EAMPD.END_DATE
AND NOT EXISTS /* donot pull already populated records */
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DIST_ITEMLN WATGLD
WHERE NATGLD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY = WATGLD.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY)
AND NOT EXISTS  /* Q2FY15--Filter OA records which are already populated */
(SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_AR_TRX_ITEM_LINE NATIL1
WHERE NATGLD.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY = NATIL1.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY
AND NATIL1.OFFER_ATTRIBUTED_FLG  = 'Y' 
/* AND NATIL1.WITH_PARENT_ROLE = 'Y' */
)
